condition.acceptance_rule: counterfactual_only: missing kind defaults to todo and description may serve as text; no live harness repair
condition.prompt_addendum: Counterfactual scoring contract: an open item may omit kind if the authored object has a usable description; missing kind maps to todo and description maps to text for scoring only. The live harness must not silently repair or apply this normalization.
